projectDescription: A lightweight, high-performance cross-platform AI chat desktop client with a built-in local API gateway, supporting OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and all OpenAI-compatible providers.
keyFeatures: Multi-provider AI chat with OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and all OpenAI-compatible APIs
AI Agent mode with three-tier permission controls and sandboxed working directory
Local API Gateway with OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini native protocol support
Local knowledge base (RAG) with semantic search across uploaded documents
Multi-namespace memory system for persistent conversational context
Full MCP (Model Context Protocol) implementation with stdio and HTTP transports
AES-256 encryption for sensitive data with isolated data directories
Auto backup to local directories or WebDAV, with one-click restore
Cross-platform support: macOS, Windows 10/11, and Linux
Rich content rendering: Markdown, LaTeX, Mermaid, D2 diagrams, Monaco editor
publicApiSurface: POST /v1/messages — Anthropic Claude Messages API endpoint
POST /v1beta/models/{model_action} — Gemini model operations (generateContent, streamGenerateContent, countTokens)
GET /v1/realtime — WebRTC realtime voice endpoint (coming soon)
